meta.title: MoneyWise — Your money. Yours, offline.
meta.description: The personal finance app that keeps every record, budget, and insight on your device. Multi-currency. BYOK AI advisor. Optional encrypted sync.

hero.subhead: Records, budgets, investments, and AI insights — all stored on your phone. Cloud sync is optional; privacy isn't.
hero.coming_soon: Coming soon to the App Store

features.title: Everything about your money, in one app.

items.title: Dashboard
items.description: Net worth, trends, and upcoming bills at a glance.

items.title: Records
items.description: Fast entry, voice input, receipt photos, calendar view.

items.title: Accounts
items.description: Checking, savings, cards, cash — in any currency.

items.title: Investments
items.description: Live quotes, portfolio allocation, per-holding history.

items.title: Budgets
items.description: Monthly budgets per category with pacing and transfers.

items.title: AI Advisor
items.description: Bring your own Anthropic or OpenAI key for on-device insights.

screenshots.title: Designed to feel native on iPhone.
captions: Dashboard — net worth and daily pulse
Records — fast entry, grouped by day
Daily Brief — one-line summary each morning

privacyFirst.title: Your data stays on your phone.
privacyFirst.subhead: MoneyWise is built local-first. No ads, no trackers, no data sale — ever.

pillars.title: Offline-first
pillars.description: Every record is stored locally in an encrypted SQLite database. Works with airplane mode on.

pillars.title: Optional cloud sync
pillars.description: Sync across your own devices when you turn it on. Rows are encrypted at rest; we can't read them.

pillars.title: BYOK AI
pillars.description: Bring your own Anthropic or OpenAI key. Keys live in the iOS keychain and never transit our servers.

pricing.title: Free for everyday use. Pro when you need more.
pricing.subhead: No trial games. No dark patterns. Cancel any time in the App Store.
pricing.free_tagline: Everything you need on a single device.
pricing.pro_tagline: Sync, backup, and more across every device.
pro_features: Pooled AI credits (no API key needed)

downloadCta.title: Take back control of your money.
downloadCta.subhead: Free to download. Pro subscription optional.

footer.tagline: Local-first personal finance, made in Singapore.
